full_text:
Guo Jia (Fengxiao) 郭嘉 (奉孝)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Jia (郭嘉), styledFengxiao (奉孝), was born in Yangzhai, Yingchuan Commandery (Presently Yu County in Henan Province). Served Cao Cao as a trusted adviser during the formative years of Wei. Guo Jia was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Guo Jia lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
